hero.title: Lucas Cáceres

about.title: Building enterprise solutions that make people's work easier.
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Developer currently working as a Power Platform Developer at ARLANXEO, where I build enterprise applications, automate business processes and integrate corporate systems used by international teams.
about.paragraph2: My daily work combines React, JavaScript, Python, SharePoint, Power Apps, Power Automate and Power BI to deliver scalable solutions focused on productivity, digital transformation and user experience.
about.paragraph3: Besides Microsoft technologies, I enjoy building modern web applications, studying software architecture and exploring AI, automation and cloud technologies.
about.experienceText: Power Platform Developer at ARLANXEO developing enterprise solutions for international teams.
about.technologiesText: React • TypeScript • Power Apps • Power Automate • SharePoint • Python • Node.js • Power BI

expertise.title: A technical stack focused on business impact.
expertise.description: My experience combines enterprise applications, automation, web development and system integrations to deliver practical solutions for real business problems.
expertise.enterpriseDescription: Business applications, process automation and corporate workflows.
expertise.fullStackDescription: Modern web interfaces, APIs and scalable application foundations.
expertise.automationDescription: Scripts, intelligent workflows and document or process automation.
expertise.toolsDescription: Development tools, databases and platforms used across projects.

projects.title: Real solutions for automation, business apps and web development.
projects.activityDescription: Power Apps solution integrated with SharePoint, Power Automate and Power BI to manage activities, track status and monitor weekly planning.
projects.invoiceDescription: Business solution to generate PDF invoices using Power Apps, Power Automate and JavaScript document processing.
projects.migrationDescription: Automation process for converting, organizing and migrating corporate documents from IBM Notes to SharePoint.
projects.tradingDescription: Python-based automation project integrated with MetaTrader to process market signals and manage trading operations.

experience.title: Practical experience building enterprise applications.
experience.description: Development of enterprise solutions focused on process automation, system integrations and corporate workflow optimization with international teams.
experience.highlight1: Built Power Apps integrated with SharePoint, Power Automate and Power BI.
experience.highlight2: Automated Excel data migration, status tracking and weekly planning workflows.
experience.highlight3: Developed invoice generation solutions with PDF automation.
experience.highlight4: Created HR request management systems with automated email summaries.
experience.highlight5: Automated IBM Notes to SharePoint document migration using Python and Power Automate.
